title: arwa adel
message:
Yaa Hadyyyyy

3arfa enna mashtaghlnash ma3 ba3d kteer... bas el safar by3arafak el nas bgad 😅

Thank you for being literally the easiest person on earth to deal with, w esm 3ala mosamma 100% 😂

Wishing you all the best in your next adventure! W hastanak teshtaghal policy zay ma oltly😎

Good luck with everything, and inshallah our paths will cross one day.

All the best,
Arwa

title: maria
message: Hadyyyyy. Alf Alf mabrook on this next step :,) enjoy it - inshallah hanshofak akbr tech bro fi amazon after these four/five years. I’d say you’ll be missed but the truth is you’re already missed and especially all our a5r So2al sessions. The one silver lining is I won’t be the only person in North America anymore and our time zones will be closer 🫡. Best of luck with your PhD I’m sure you’ll do great and I can’t wait to hear all about it! Also can’t wait to visit at some point!

title: menna enan
message:
Hello hello Ostaz Hady
I just wanted to say en I was suuuuper lucky to have got the chance to work closely with you these past couple of months. The work you've done is nothing short of magnificent!!!

Bs aside from work, I'm genuinely suuuper happy for you!! I know that getting out is something that you have wanted dearly for a while and to get to do that while also getting your PhD must mean a  lot. 

Fa bgd best of luck in your next chapter. I know you will do AMAZINGLY w bgd if you ever feel overwhelmed or intimidated, efteker en el kol el nas eli ma3ahom PhDs asbato enaha mogared foka3a if you don't have the skills to back it up, which you 100% do!!

So, good luck and I hope we stay in touch. Rabena ma3aaaaak <3

title: yostina
message:
Ya Hadddddddyyyy. Don't know where to start but let's just say you will be immensely missed. You are one of the funniest and most hardworking people I have met and I am very proud of you and what you have achieved. So I can't wait for you to become Dr. Hady while I continue doing my research and not applying for a PhD in the USA 😂😂
You will be truly missed and we still need to do the Halyeb trip 🤷🏻‍♀️
And of course our best memory is قعدة اخر سؤال , which will be one of the most wholesome outings that I had in 2025 😌😌
Best of luck on your journey, I am sure you will be a cool Dr !

title: انس ممدوح
message: يا هادي انا هفتقدك جدااا جدااا و اتمني كل الخير و التوفيق الفتره ال جايه و انا متاكد ان شاء الله انك اد المرحله ال جايه و هتعمل شغل عالي ان شاء الله . عاوز اقولك انك من اكتر الناس ال شجعتني في الفتره ال فاتت اني اخد خطوه و اتحرك و احاول اعمل اي حاجه اغير بيها نفسي . بجد شكراا يا هادي علي كل الدعم ال قدمتهولي و كل النصايح . و شكرااا كتيرر علي بروكار ال كان اقتراحك من الاول . بجد لمتنا بعد كده في المكتب هتبقي نقصاك .

title: sherif joseph
message:
Hady
Since the first time I saw you, I knew we were going to be friends. Your calm posture and your friendly spirit were so inviting.
Once I got to know you, I got to see the depth of your character a hardworking man who, after investing years in college, shifted everything and started a new journey. You excelled, from leaving Chicago to coming to JPAL and improving yourself all over again. And you did all of this while staying humble, encouraging everyone around you, and always underselling yourself.
You are a genuine person, Hady. Thank you for all our deep talks. Thank you for always being present and helpful whenever needed. You have a unique gift for bringing people together you're always keen on making everyone feel included. Thank you for listening to all my stories, all the things that were hard on me. Thank you for making the office brighter, funnier. Thank you for bearing all the difficulties at work while still smiling and still being there for everyone.
I don't think of you as just a coworker. I've gained a true brother, and I'm so excited for what the future holds for you. I'm sure that God's grace, which has been with you throughout these years, will not leave you. I know there are a lot of uncertainties right now and a lot of unanswered questions, but I'm sure everything will become clearer ,because you are hardworking, faithful, and humble. And people like that are the ones who get the opportunities. And when they get them, they don't let it change them for the worse.
You are a unique human being, Hady I'm blessed by our friendship. And I hope in counties growing and will be keen on that !

title: مريم جورج
message:
يا هادى ❤️ شكرا على الوقت اللى اشتغلنا فيه سوا فى باب أمل ... انا شخصيا اتعلمت منك كتير من التزامك وتركيزك العالى فى الشغل خصوصا فى البيانات اللى اوقات بتكون مش منطقية😅
كنت مميز فى طريقة شغلك واهتمامك بالتفاصيل لكن فى صمت شديد 😁
يارب دايما تكون فاكر المواقف الكوميدية من تدريبات الباحثات والفيلد فى أسيوط ( مع حسين وانتم بتدوروا عليه)

بتمنالك كل حاجه حلوة وجميلة ومميزة علشان انت شاطر ومميز فى كل حاجه

title: rania fleifel
message: Hadyyy, I genuinely lucked out getting to know you throughout your time at jpal. There are people that you cross paths with, part ways with but who leave a lasting mark, you're one of those. Thankyou for making some days more bearable, for -reluctantly xD - inviting some of the noise when i needed someone i trust to lend an ear. Thankyou for being a friend. I'll miss having you around. Just keep swimming :) Only the best roads ahead for you, ya rab.
